title: Contracts for Difference (CfD): Allocation Round 8
body: "The Contracts for Difference (CfD) scheme is the government’s main mechanism for supporting low-carbon electricity generation.  This page pulls together all documents relating to CfD Allocation Round 8 (AR8).  More information and background to the CfD scheme.  The CfD microsite (resource portal)  The CfD microsite (or resource portal) provides a central, comprehensive source of up-to-date information on all aspects of AR8 and future rounds, including information from the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) and the CfD delivery partners:   National Grid Electricity System Operator (Electricity Market Reform Delivery Body) the Low Carbon Contracts Company Ofgem   Use the microsite to:   subscribe to receive notifications on new information uploaded to the microsite access all relevant publications, such as consultation responses and guidance, in one place find more using the frequently asked questions (FAQs) page contact the delivery partners to ask questions on AR8 that were not addressed by the FAQs  register to attend events   Visit the CfD Allocation Round site.   CfD Bulletins  Let us know if you’d like to receive updates on the current allocation round by emailing ContractsForDifference@energysecurity.gov.uk.  Find past bulletins.  "
